# AI Memory - Global Status Template

> Updated: YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm

## Initialization Migration

Write pending initialization or migration items and the next action.

## Reading Processing

Write reading-related pending status. If none, write "None".

## Permanent Notes

Write card-making pending status. If none, write "None".

## Projects

Write project-related pending status. If none, write "None".

## Reviews

Write weekly, monthly, and yearly review status and the most recent completion time.
